  • Uses of ChatPipelineManager.RegisteredPipelineStep in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI

    Methods in me.tyyni.yoChat.yoChatAPI that return types with arguments of type ChatPipelineManager.RegisteredPipelineStep
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Collection<ChatPipelineManager.RegisteredPipelineStep>
    YoChatAPI.getAllRegisteredPipelineSteps()
    Returns all registered pipeline steps across every stage.
    static List<ChatPipelineManager.RegisteredPipelineStep>
    YoChatAPI.getRegisteredPipelineSteps(Stage stage)
    Returns the registered pipeline steps for a specific stage.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Map<Stage,List<ChatPipelineManager.RegisteredPipelineStep>>
    ChatPipelineManager.getRegisteredSteps()
    Returns all registered pipeline steps grouped by stage.
    List<ChatPipelineManager.RegisteredPipelineStep>
    ChatPipelineManager.getSteps(Stage stage)
    Returns the registered steps for a single stage.
